name: Inside-Out Western Omelets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 6 slices of bologna in a skillet until the center puffs up, about 1 minute.
2. Place bologna cups in lightly greased muffin cups.
3. Chop the remaining 2 slices of bologna.
4. In a small bowl, beat together eggs and milk.
5. Stir in the chopped bologna and onion.
6. Pour egg mixture into bologna cups.
7. Bake, uncovered, in an oven preheated to 375°F for 15 to 17 minutes or until eggs are set.
8. Sprinkle with shredded American cheese.
9. Continue baking for a couple of minutes longer until cheese melts.
